languages.text: "Я есть Триасомата, искупление от смерти. Мы навеки едины с Нунциусом, я больше не покину его". {n}Глядя куда-то сквозь вас, Эоганн блаженно улыбается.{/n} "Я так рад, что наконец-то смог спасти тебя, дражайший коллега".

"I am the Triasomata, redemption from death. Nuncius and I are forever one, I will not be parted from him again." {n}Looking somewhere beyond you, Eogunn smiles blissfully.{/n} "I am so glad I was finally able to save you, dearest colleague."
languages.original_text: "Я есть Триасомата, искупление от смерти. Мы навеки едины с Нунциусом, я больше не покину его". {n}Глядя куда-то сквозь вас, Эоганн блаженно улыбается.{/n} "Я так рад, что наконец-то смог спасти тебя, дражайший коллега".

traits.locale_text: "I am the Triasomata, redemption from death. Nuncius and I are forever one, I will not be parted from him again." {n}Looking somewhere beyond you, Eogunn smiles blissfully.{/n} "I am so glad I was finally able to save you, dearest colleague."

"I am the Triasomata, redemption from death. Nuncius and I are forever one, I will not be parted from him again." {n}Looking somewhere beyond you, Eogunn smiles blissfully.{/n} "I am so glad I was finally able to save you, dearest colleague."

"I am the Triasomata, redemption from death. Nuncius and I are forever one, I will not be parted from him again." {n}Looking somewhere beyond you, Eogunn smiles blissfully.{/n} "I am so glad I was finally able to save you, dearest colleague."

languages.text: «Soy el triasómata, la redención de la muerte. Nuncius y yo somos uno. Nunca volveré a separarme de él». {n}Mirando más allá de ti, Eogunn sonríe feliz.{/n} «Me alegro de haber podido salvarle por fin, mi querido colega».
languages.original_text: "I am the Triasomata, redemption from death. Nuncius and I are forever one, I will not be parted from him again." {n}Looking somewhere beyond you, Eogunn smiles blissfully.{/n} "I am so glad I was finally able to save you, dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: «Soy el triasómata, la redención de la muerte. Nuncius y yo somos uno. Nunca volveré a separarme de él». {n}Mirando más allá de ti, Eogunn sonríe feliz.{/n} «Me alegro de haber podido salvarle por fin, mi querido colega».

languages.text: “我便是三相体，是死亡的救赎。努恩修斯与我，将永远合为一体，再不分离。”{n}伊奥贡的目光望向某个你身后不存在的地方，露出了幸福的微笑。{/n}“我终于能拯救你了，我最亲爱的同僚，我为此由衷地感到欣慰。”
languages.original_text: "I am the Triasomata, redemption from death. Nuncius and I are forever one, I will not be parted from him again." {n}Looking somewhere beyond you, Eogunn smiles blissfully.{/n} "I am so glad I was finally able to save you, dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: “我便是三相体，是死亡的救赎。努恩修斯与我，将永远合为一体，再不分离。”{n}伊奥贡的目光望向某个你身后不存在的地方，露出了幸福的微笑。{/n}“我终于能拯救你了，我最亲爱的同僚，我为此由衷地感到欣慰。”

languages.text: « Je suis le Triasomata, la victoire sur la mort. Nuncius et moi sommes unis pour l'éternité, je ne serai plus jamais séparé de lui. » {n}Eogunn sourit d'un air béat en fixant quelque chose derrière vous.{/n} « Je me réjouis d'avoir enfin pu te sauver, mon cher collègue. »
languages.original_text: "I am the Triasomata, redemption from death. Nuncius and I are forever one, I will not be parted from him again." {n}Looking somewhere beyond you, Eogunn smiles blissfully.{/n} "I am so glad I was finally able to save you, dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis le Triasomata, la victoire sur la mort. Nuncius et moi sommes unis pour l'éternité, je ne serai plus jamais séparé de lui. » {n}Eogunn sourit d'un air béat en fixant quelque chose derrière vous.{/n} « Je me réjouis d'avoir enfin pu te sauver, mon cher collègue. »

languages.text: "Ben Üçyeköz'üm, ölümden kurtuluşum. Nuncius ve ben sonsuza dek biriz, ondan bir daha asla ayrılmayacağım." {n}Arkanda bir yere bakan Eogunn, mutlulukla gülümsüyor.{/n} "Seni sonunda kurtarabildiğim için o kadar mutluyum ki pek değerli meslektaşım."
languages.original_text: "I am the Triasomata, redemption from death. Nuncius and I are forever one, I will not be parted from him again." {n}Looking somewhere beyond you, Eogunn smiles blissfully.{/n} "I am so glad I was finally able to save you, dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: "Ben Üçyeköz'üm, ölümden kurtuluşum. Nuncius ve ben sonsuza dek biriz, ondan bir daha asla ayrılmayacağım." {n}Arkanda bir yere bakan Eogunn, mutlulukla gülümsüyor.{/n} "Seni sonunda kurtarabildiğim için o kadar mutluyum ki pek değerli meslektaşım."

languages.text: "Ich bin der Triasomata, die Erlösung vom Tod. Nuncius und ich sind auf ewig eins. Ich werde mich nicht mehr von ihm trennen." {n}Eogunn schaut an dir vorbei und lächelt glückselig.{/n} "Ich bin so froh, dass ich Euch endlich retten konnte, geschätzter Kollege."
languages.original_text: "I am the Triasomata, redemption from death. Nuncius and I are forever one, I will not be parted from him again." {n}Looking somewhere beyond you, Eogunn smiles blissfully.{/n} "I am so glad I was finally able to save you, dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin der Triasomata, die Erlösung vom Tod. Nuncius und ich sind auf ewig eins. Ich werde mich nicht mehr von ihm trennen." {n}Eogunn schaut an dir vorbei und lächelt glückselig.{/n} "Ich bin so froh, dass ich Euch endlich retten konnte, geschätzter Kollege."

languages.text: 「私はトリアソマタ、死からの贖いです。ヌンキウスと私は永遠に一つであり、私は二度と彼と引き離されることはありません」{n}あなたの向こうのどこかを見つめ、エオガンは至福の笑みを浮かべる。{/n}「ついにあなたを救うことができて、私は本当に嬉しいのです、親愛なる同僚」
languages.original_text: "I am the Triasomata, redemption from death. Nuncius and I are forever one, I will not be parted from him again." {n}Looking somewhere beyond you, Eogunn smiles blissfully.{/n} "I am so glad I was finally able to save you, dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: 「私はトリアソマタ、死からの贖いです。ヌンキウスと私は永遠に一つであり、私は二度と彼と引き離されることはありません」{n}あなたの向こうのどこかを見つめ、エオガンは至福の笑みを浮かべる。{/n}「ついにあなたを救うことができて、私は本当に嬉しいのです、親愛なる同僚」
